strings.name: Brahmapoutre at Rabat
strings.description: YouthMappers chapter at Université Mohammed V Rabat
strings.extendedDescription: This chapter sees participation in the YouthMappers program as an oppourtunity to share our knowlege create new working relationships with other chapters in different countries
